_meta.architectural_mandate: O(1) dictionary routing. UI presentation managed via _index array. Unified telemetry scoring. Self-healing fallback logic for core execution nodes.

support_infrastructure.message: If this architecture provides value, consider supporting the deployment infrastructure.

deepseek-r1.label: DeepSeek R1
deepseek-r1.description: Maximum reasoning yield at zero marginal cost. The undisputed workhorse of the subscription tier.

deepseek/deepseek-v3.2.label: DeepSeek V3.2
deepseek/deepseek-v3.2.description: Highly optimized dense architecture. Faster than R1 for tasks not requiring deep logic.

deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3.1.label: DeepSeek V3.1
deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3.1.description: Previous gen V3. High-speed fallback for quick terminal outputs.

claude-3-7-sonnet-20250219.label: Claude 3.7 Sonnet
claude-3-7-sonnet-20250219.description: Apex for zero-shot architectural coding and system design.

anthropic/claude-opus-latest.label: Claude Opus Latest
anthropic/claude-opus-latest.description: Heavyweight parsing. For analyzing massive, unstructured data sets.

claude-haiku-4-5-20251001.label: Claude Haiku 4.5
claude-haiku-4-5-20251001.description: Lightning fast, cheap context. Superior for processing mid-sized logs rapidly.

openai/gpt-5.4-pro.label: GPT 5.4 Pro
openai/gpt-5.4-pro.description: Absolute maximum proprietary capability. Emergency use only.

openai/o3-mini.label: OpenAI o3-mini
openai/o3-mini.description: High-efficiency proprietary reasoning. Cost-effective for isolated logic loops.

meta-llama/llama-4-scout.description: Mid-range Llama 4 variant. Good balance of context and speed.

meta-llama/llama-3.2-3b-instruct.description: Micro-binary. Instant time-to-first-token for rapid CLI pipelining.

qwen3-235b-a22b:thinking.description: Massive Qwen3 MoE with explicit reasoning. Highest open-weight capability.

qwen3-30b-a3b:thinking.label: Qwen3 30B A3B (Thinking)
qwen3-30b-a3b:thinking.description: Efficient MoE reasoning. Strong mid-tier alternative to full 235B.

qwen3-32b:thinking.description: Dense 32B reasoning model. Reliable performance across diverse tasks.

qwq-32b.label: Qwen QwQ 32B
qwq-32b.description: Mid-weight reasoning engine. Excellent fallback when heavier models time out.

qwen/qwen2.5-72b-instruct.description: High-capability dense model. Strong general instruction following.

qwen/qwen2.5-coder-32b-instruct.description: Unmatched mid-weight code generation. Zero bloat, highly accurate syntax.

google/gemma-3-27b-it.description: Strong open-weight alternative for mathematical and logical parsing.
